phrases.intent_en: Ask where Largo da Fonte is
phrases.text_local: Onde é que fica o Largo da Fonte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH FEE-kuh AW LAH-ruh-goo DUH FOHNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: A historic square known for its stone fountain and local crafts.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Largo da Fonte.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-ruh-goo DUH FOHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Largo da Fonte.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Largo da Fonte.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW LAH-ruh-goo DUH FOHNG-tih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Largo da Fonte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Largo da Fonte is
phrases.text_local: Podes dizer-me onde fica o Largo da Fonte?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-desh dee-ZEHR-meh ON-deh FEE-kah oo LAR-goo dah FOHN-teh?
phrases.cultural_note: Largo da Fonte is a public square in Monte, Funchal.

likely_response.local: Fica no centro, perto da praça principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo, PEHR-too DUH PRAH-suh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Can you tell me where Largo da Fonte is?

responses.english: Can you tell me where Largo da Fonte is?
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo, PEHR-too DUH PRAH-suh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Fica no centro, perto da praça principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the toboggan ride starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começam os carreiros do Monte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suhng OOSH kuh-RAY-roosh DOO MOHNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional wicker toboggan ride down the hills of Monte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the toboggan ride starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa o passeio de trenó em Monte?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee koh-meh-SAH oo pah-SAY-oo jee-treh-NOH ehm-MON-chee
phrases.cultural_note: Carreiros do Monte departs from the upper station near the sanctuary.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, começa junto à Igreja do Monte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, koo-MEH-suh ZHOONNG-too AH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO MOHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it starts next to the Monte Church.

responses.english: Good morning, it starts next to the Monte Church.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, koo-MEH-suh ZHOONNG-too AH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO MOHNG-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, começa junto à Igreja do Monte.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à Igreja de Nossa Senhora do Monte?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DOO MOHNG-tih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a igreja no topo do Monte. O sacristão pode ajudar na entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh NOO TAW-poo DOO MOHNG-tih. AW suhk-reesh-TOWN PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the church at the top of Monte. The sacristan can help at the entrance.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the church at the top of Monte. The sacristan can help at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh NOO TAW-poo DOO MOHNG-tih. AW suhk-reesh-TOWN PAW-dih uh-zhoo-DAHR NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a igreja no topo do Monte. O sacristão pode ajudar na entrada.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Jardim Tropical do Monte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL DOO MOHNG-tih?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Guarda do Jardim Tropical, que poderá indicar-lhe o acesso adequado.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GWAH-ruh-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL, KIH poh-deh-RAH een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AW uh-SEH-soo uh-dihk-WAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the Tropical Garden Guard, who can show you the proper entrance.

responses.english: Ask the Tropical Garden Guard, who can show you the proper entrance.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GWAH-ruh-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL, KIH poh-deh-RAH een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AW uh-SEH-soo uh-dihk-WAH-doo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao Guarda do Jardim Tropical, que poderá indicar-lhe o acesso adequado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Monte Market is located
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Mercado do Monte, por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka oo mer-KAH-doo doo MON-chee por fah-VOR
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional open-air market situated near the main sanctuary.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto à Igreja do Monte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO MOHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the Monte Church.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the Monte Church.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO MOHNG-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica junto à Igreja do Monte.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Jardim Tropical do Monte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL DOO MOHNG-tih?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Tropical do Monte.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL DOO MOHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Monte Palace Tropical Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Monte Palace Tropical Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN troo-pee-KAHL DOO MOHNG-tih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Tropical do Monte.
